articles.summary: Barring another signing, the backup center for the Los Angeles Lakers projects to be Kevon Looney. articles.title: Cameron Carr is popping off in Summer League here's what the data says
articles.original_title: Cameron Carr is popping off in Summer League here's what the data says
articles.summary: 15.3 PPG, 3.7 REB, 42% FG in Vegas. The Lakers knew what they were doing. Who he is: 6'5" guard from Baylor with elite scoring efficiency (TS% 62.2). Archetype model has him as a Heliocentric Engine (25.7%) with real off-ball and 3&D upside — more versatile than his draft slot suggests.
